data.title: IFS Breaks with Industry Convention Pricing to Unlock Enterprise-Wide AI Adoption
data.description: The leading provider of Industrial AI software, IFS, introduced a new pricing model in Paris on April 2, 2026. Unlike traditional methods based on headcount, this innovative approach determines pricing based on assets. This model aims to facilitate widespread adoption of Industrial AI and cater to the growing demand in the market. This move signifies a significant shift in the industry and is likely to appeal to a wide range of enterprises seeking to leverage AI technology.

data.title: Inaugural Bonjour Brand Forum • Macao Opens, Signaling a New Phase in Sino-Franco-Lusophone Collaboration
data.description: On March 23-24, 2026, Macao hosted the first Bonjour Brand Forum, a collaborative effort by the Macau Live Streaming Association and the Bonjour Brand Forum Organizing Committee. The event received backing from the Economic and Technological sectors.

data.title: Vlad Tenev Pushed Hard Early Proving Robinhood Could Build 'Meaningful' Products—Now Chases This Goal
data.description: The CEO of Robinhood Markets Inc. (NASDAQ: HOOD), Vlad Tenev, emphasized his commitment to a more inclusive financial system by shifting his focus from creating to what should genuinely exist. Tenev, in a recent post, discussed his career evolution, stating that while initially demonstrating the capability to create significant entities drove his work, his focus has now transitioned. "The question shifted from creation to deserving existence. This shift has led me towards a bigger perspective on accessibility and ownership," said Tenev. Previously, much effort was dedicated to proving the capability of building significant entities. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Best Way to Invest in Gold (2026): Priority Gold Recognized for Gold IRA Rollovers and Physical Precious Metals by Better Business Advice
data.description: In its 2026 evaluation of gold investment providers, Better Business Advice highlighted Priority Gold for its expertise in precious metals IRA rollovers and offering access to physical gold and silver. This recognition underscores the growing investor interest in the sector. The report was published on April 2, 2026, in New York.

data.title: BNB holders earned 177% returns from staking and airdrops since 2024, with 1 BNB generating $553 through Launchpool and price gains.
data.description: According to data from Binance, holding 1 BNB since January 2024 has led to generating a total of $553 in returns. This was achieved through participation in Launchpool, receiving airdrops, and benefiting from price appreciation. Further details on how this yield accumulation process operates can be found by reading more on the subject.

data.title: European governments aim to create a safer online space for kids by regulating social media and algorithms.
data.description: Efforts are being made by the European Union and individual countries to reduce the addictive nature of social media platforms and algorithms, with a focus on enhancing safety measures, particularly for children.
